title: My Wealth Lifts the Room
subtitle: An affirmation for claiming the generous, encouraging effect of a life well-built and lived openly
excerpt: A brief affirmation from the Day 82 theme of a 12-week money programme. The statement names wealth not as something to keep private but as something whose presence lifts the people around it.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 82 affirmation in MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796).

content.text: A brief affirmation from the Day 82 theme of a 12-week money programme. Day 82: inspire others through your wealth. The statement names the natural, generous effect of living openly: not a strategy, a fact.
Say it three times in the morning, hand on heart. Let it set the tone for how you show up today.
My wealth lifts the room. My ease is permission for others.
Adapted from the Day 82 affirmation in MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
